brief_notes: Well-presented methods paper introducing TEMPy-REFF for cryo-EM structure refinement using Gaussian mixture models and B-factor estimation via EM algorithm. Large benchmark (366 maps) with statistically significant improvements over CERES and deposited models. Mathematical formulation is clear. Three diverse case studies demonstrate practical utility. The AlphaFold integration for modelling previously unresolved regions is forward-looking. Map segmentation and composition are useful additions. Loses minor points for the methods section needing more implementation details and the ensemble generation approach being somewhat standard (L-BFGS minimization after random perturbation).
